responsibilities: Monitor and optimize daily production line performance to meet throughput, quality, and on-time delivery targets
Troubleshoot equipment malfunctions and production bottlenecks, coordinating with maintenance to minimize downtime
Lead root cause analysis for production defects and implement corrective actions to sustain quality improvements
Develop and update production schedules and capacity plans in coordination with operations and supply chain teams
Drive continuous improvement projects using Lean and Kaizen methods to reduce scrap rates and cycle times
Train and support production floor staff on new processes, standard work instructions, and safety procedures
Track and report key production metrics including OEE, yield, and downtime to identify improvement opportunities
Collaborate with engineering teams to implement process changes and validate new equipment on the production floor
